The current state of the archive:

  • ACTIVE – The archive is ready and available for use.

  • PENDING_DELETION – The archive has been marked for deletion and will be permanently deleted in 30 days. No further modifications can be made in this state.

LastUpdatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the archive was modified.

RetentionPeriod.description: The enum value sets the period for retaining emails in an archive.

ArchiveId.description: The identifier of the archive the email export was performed from.

Filters.description: The criteria used to filter emails included in the export.

FromTimestamp.description: The start of the timestamp range the exported emails cover.

ToTimestamp.description: The end of the date range the exported emails cover.

MaxResults.description: The maximum number of email items included in the export.

ExportDestinationConfiguration.description: Where the exported emails are being delivered.

Status.description: The current status of the export job.

Include.description: The filter conditions for emails to include.

Unless.description: The filter conditions for emails to exclude.

Envelope.description: The SMTP envelope information of the email.

Timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the email was received.

IngressPointId.description: The ID of the ingress endpoint through which the email was received.

TrafficPolicyId.description: The ID of the traffic policy that was in effect when the email was received.

RuleSetId.description: The ID of the rule set that processed the email.

SenderHostname.description: The name of the host from which the email was received.

SenderIpAddress.description: The IP address of the host from which the email was received.

TlsCipherSuite.description: The TLS cipher suite used to communicate with the host from which the email was received.

TlsProtocol.description: The TLS protocol used to communicate with the host from which the email was received.

SendingMethod.description: The name of the API call used when sent through a configuration set with archiving enabled.

SourceIdentity.description: The identity name used to authorize the sending action when sent through a configuration set with archiving enabled.

SendingPool.description: The name of the dedicated IP pool used when sent through a configuration set with archiving enabled.

ConfigurationSet.description: The name of the configuration set used when sent through a configuration set with archiving enabled.

SourceArn.description: Specifies the archived email source, identified by either a Rule Set's ARN with an Archive action, or a Configuration Set's Archive ARN.

Body.description: The textual body content of the email message.

Text.description: The plain text body content of the message.

Html.description: The HTML body content of the message.

MessageMalformed.description: A flag indicating if the email was malformed.

ArchiveId.description: The identifier of the archive the email search was performed in.

Filters.description: The criteria used to filter emails included in the search.

FromTimestamp.description: The start timestamp of the range the searched emails cover.

ToTimestamp.description: The end timestamp of the range the searched emails cover.

MaxResults.description: The maximum number of search results to return.

Status.description: The current status of the search job.

Include.description: The filter conditions for emails to include.

Unless.description: The filter conditions for emails to exclude.

Rows.description: The list of email result objects matching the search criteria.

ArchivedMessageId.description: The unique identifier of the archived message.

ReceivedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the email was received.

To.description: The email addresses in the To header.

Cc.description: The email addresses in the CC header.

Subject.description: The subject header value of the email.

MessageId.description: The unique message ID of the email.

HasAttachments.description: A flag indicating if the email has attachments.

ReceivedHeaders.description: The received headers from the email delivery path.

InReplyTo.description: The email message ID this is a reply to.

XMailer.description: The user agent that sent the email.

XOriginalMailer.description: The original user agent that sent the email.

IngressPointId.description: The ID of the ingress endpoint through which the email was received.

SenderHostname.description: The name of the host from which the email was received.

SenderIpAddress.description:
• Mail archived with Mail Manager: The IP address of the client that connects to the ingress endpoint.

  • Mail sent through a configuration set with the archiving option enabled: The IP address of the client that makes the SendEmail API call.

Envelope.description: The SMTP envelope information of the email.

Helo.description: The HELO used by the host from which the email was received.

From.description: The RCPT FROM given by the host from which the email was received.

To.description: All SMTP TO entries given by the host from which the email was received.

SourceArn.description: Specifies the archived email source, identified by either a Rule Set's ARN with an Archive action, or a Configuration Set's Archive ARN.

LastModifiedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when relay was last updated.

NoAuthentication.description: Keep an empty structure if the relay destination server does not require SMTP credential authentication.

CreatedDate.description: The date of when then rule set was created.

LastModificationDate.description: The date of when the rule set was last modified.

Rules.description: The rules contained in the rule set.

Conditions.description: The conditions of this rule. All conditions must match the email for the actions to be executed. An empty list of conditions means that all emails match, but are still subject to any "unless conditions"

Unless.description: The "unless conditions" of this rule. None of the conditions can match the email for the actions to be executed. If any of these conditions do match the email, then the actions are not executed.

Actions.description: The list of actions to execute when the conditions match the incoming email, and none of the "unless conditions" match.

MaxMessageSizeBytes.description: The maximum message size in bytes of email which is allowed in by this traffic policy—anything larger will be blocked.

DefaultAction.description: The default action of the traffic policy.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the traffic policy was created.

LastUpdatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the traffic policy was last updated.

Conditions.description: The list of conditions to apply to incoming messages for filtering email traffic.

Action.description: The action that informs a traffic policy resource to either allow or block the email if it matches a condition in the policy statement.
